zh.lifeSummary: 當Rey Alfonso VIII de Castilla於1155年11月11日出生在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安索里亞時，他的父親Rey Sancho III de Castilla20歲，母親Blanca de Navarra22歲。他於1180年9月與Eleanor of England Queen of Castile在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安布爾戈斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1214年10月5日在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安艾維拉古-姆尼奧斯享年58歲，埋葬在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安布爾戈斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rey Alfonso VIII de Castilla于1155年11月11日出生在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安索里亞时，他的父亲Rey Sancho III de Castilla20岁，母亲Blanca de Navarra22岁。他于1180年9月与Eleanor of England Queen of Castile在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安布爾戈斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他去世于1214年10月5日在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安艾維拉古-姆尼奧斯享年58岁，埋葬在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安布爾戈斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Castilla
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Alfredo, Carlos, Raul, Sergio, Jesus, Jorge, Pablo, Ruben, Blanca, Elido, Francisco, Guillermo.
Spanish: habitational name from Castile (Spanish Castilla), a region in central Spain. The name derives from the many castles in the region. This surname is also found in southern France.
History: As an independent kingdom between the 10th and 15th centuries, Castile formed the largest power in the Iberian peninsula.

variants.name: Castiglia
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Angelo, Annamarie, Antonino, Benedetto, Carmine, Francesco, Gaetano, Gennaro, Giacomo, Giuseppe, Ignazio.
Italian: habitational name from Castile (Italian Castiglia) in central Spain (see Castilla ).

nameMeanings.name: Alfonso
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Visigothic: probably a compound of adal ‘noble’ + funs ‘ready’; a traditional royal name.

nameMeanings.name: VIII
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine pet form of   Vivien   and   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

historicEvents.description: The Christian territory controlled the Kingdoms of Aragon, Navarre, and Castile.

en.lifeSummary: When Rey Alfonso VIII de Castilla was born on 11 November 1155, in Soria, Castilla y León, Spain, his father, Rey Sancho III de Castilla, was 20 and his mother, Blanca de Navarra, was 22. He married Eleanor of England Queen of Castile in September 1180, in Burgos, Castilla y León, Spain. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 8 daughters. He died on 5 October 1214, in Gutierre-Muñoz, Ávila, Castilla y León, Spain, at the age of 58, and was buried in Burgos, Castilla y León, Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rey Alfonso VIII de Castilla est né le 11 novembre 1155, à Soria, Castilla y León, Espagne, son père, Rey Sancho III de Castilla, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Blanca de Navarra, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor of England Queen of Castile en septembre 1180, à Burgos, Castilla y León, Espagne. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé le 5 octobre 1214, à Gutierre-Muñoz, Ávila, Castilla y León, Espagne, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Burgos, Castilla y León, Espagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rey Alfonso VIII de Castilla am 11. November 1155 in Soria, Castilla y León, Spanien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Rey Sancho III de Castilla 20 und seine Mutter Blanca de Navarra 22. Er hat im September 1180 in Burgos, Castilla y León, Spanien Eleanor of England Queen of Castile geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Er starb am 5. Oktober 1214 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Gutierre-Muñoz, Ávila, Castilla y León, Spanien und wurde in Burgos, Castilla y León, Spanien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rey Alfonso VIII de Castilla è nato il il 11 novembre 1155 nel Soria, Castilla y León, Spagna, il suo padre, Rey Sancho III de Castilla, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Blanca de Navarra, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor of England Queen of Castile nel settembre 1180, nel Burgos, Castilla y León, Spagna. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 8 figlie. Morì il 5 ottobre 1214, nel Gutierre-Muñoz, Ávila, Castilla y León, Spagna, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a Burgos, Castilla y León, Spagna.

ja.lifeSummary: Rey Alfonso VIII de Castillaが1155年11月11日にスペインカスティラ イ レoンソリアで生まれた時，父Rey Sancho III de Castillaは20歳，母Blanca de Navarraは22歳であった。1180年9月にスペインカスティラ イ レoンブルゴスでEleanor of England Queen of Castileと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1214年10月5日にスペインカスティラ イ レoンaヴィラグティエレ-ムnオズで58歳で死去し，スペインカスティラ イ レoンブルゴスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Rey Alfonso VIII de Castilla(이)가 1155년 11월 11일 스페인 카스틸라 와이 레o 소리아에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Rey Sancho III de Castilla(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Blanca de Navarra(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1180년 9월 스페인 카스틸라 이 레o 버고스에서 Eleanor of England Queen of Castile(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1214년 10월 5일 스페인 카스틸라 와이 레o a빌라 굿이레-무n즈에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 스페인 카스틸라 이 레o 버고스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rey Alfonso VIII de Castilla nasceu em 11 de novembro de 1155, em Soria, Castilla y León, Espanha, seu pai, Rey Sancho III de Castilla, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Blanca de Navarra, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor of England Queen of Castile em setembro de 1180, em Burgos, Castilla y León, Espanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 8 filhas. Ele faleceu em 5 de outubro de 1214, em Gutierre-Muñoz, Ávila, Castilla y León, Espanha, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Burgos, Castilla y León, Espanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rey Alfonso VIII de Castilla родился 11 ноября 1155 г. в местности соря, кастилла и леoн, Испания, его отцу по имени Rey Sancho III de Castilla было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Blanca de Navarra, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor of England Queen of Castile сентябрь 1180 г. в местности бургос, кастилла и леoн, Испания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 8 дочерей. Он умер 5 октября 1214 г. в местности гутиирре-муnоз, aвила, кастилла и леoн, Испания в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности бургос, кастилла и леoн, Испания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rey Alfonso VIII de Castilla nació el 11 de noviembre de 1155, en Soria, Castilla y León, España, su papá, Rey Sancho III de Castilla, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Blanca de Navarra, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Eleanor of England Queen of Castile en septiembre de 1180, en Burgos, Castilla y León, España. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió el 5 de octubre de 1214, en Gutierre-Muñoz, Ávila, Castilla y León, España, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultado en Burgos, Castilla y León, España.
